programmes.show_description: The squad investigates a potentially violent situation stemming from a role-play session on a camming website when one user decides to meet his idol in person.
Carisi faces a powerful judge when he inexplicably dismisses a case involving a university student's rape.
Crime drama series. Kat goes overboard when she follows up on her suspicions about a trainer at her boxing gym.
Rollins goes undercover to investigate a government worker who is dealing green cards in exchange for sex
Detectives Goren and Eames encounter a gang of high-class criminals led by a dangerous European who befriends, robs and kills tourists.
Deputies are concerned when a fleeing man leaves a trail of illicit items. A young woman unwisely decides to hang out with a man she nicknamed "Sketchy."
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Deliverance: Naval crime drama. The murder of a marine leads the agents into the murky world of gang violence. Gibbs is forced to confront a mystery from his past.
Bounce: US crime drama series. Tony takes charge of the team as he reopens a case he investigated three years earlier.
South by Southwest: US crime drama. When a fellow agent is murdered, the team heads into the desert to find a woman who may hold the key to the mystery.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of an uninvited nightclub guest who, before being shot, had confronted a famous musician.
Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a black publishing executive.
Crime drama series. When a priest is murdered, Briscoe and Green seek a suspect with a grudge against God but it turns out that the clergyman was not the intended target.
A former soldier goes on trial for killing a Yemeni man he suspected of being a terrorist.
Powerful American drama about the investigation and prosecution of crime. Briscoe and Green are on the hunt for a murderer who shot and killed two professors.
Briscoe and Green uncover a murderous love triangle involving a scorned teenager and her lover.
Code of Conduct: Crime drama series. A Marine recently returned from Afghanistan is found dead in his car in what appears to be a case of suicide.
Outlaws and In-Laws: Crime drama series. Gibbs investigates whether his mentor was involved with the deaths of two soldiers in an internationally delicate incident.
Endgame: Crime drama series. When an assassin returns to threaten the safety of Vance's family, the team helps Vance to face up to his troubled past.
Reese is forced to revisit his past when the Machine produces the number of a computer analyst who seems to be stealing confidential information.
Shaw escapes her captors, but the team is unsure of her mental state when she begins to act paranoid and reckless.
Benson teams up with Lieutenant Barek and the Bronx SVU to track down a serial rapist with victims in both boroughs.
Two sisters receive help from Benson to get closure from a traumatic childhood assault; Kat's cousin seeks help.
The female CEO of a popular wellness company says she was raped, but her business partner claims the accusation is part of an embezzlement cover-up
Rollins' sister stirs up trouble and a possible SVU investigation when she reports a doctor who trades prescription painkillers for sex.
Dylan and Lizzie investigate when a street artist's work is found with a victim's body in the middle of it. Ryan catches a suspect in the Sleeping Beauty Killer investigation.
A man weaves a stolen motorbike through traffic at high speeds as he tries to evade police. Deputies examine the aftermath of a violent domestic argument.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Ideal World Shopping - For All Your Shopping Needs
Officers are dumbfounded when a man tries to talk them into taking him to jail. Sparks fly when a driver tries to take his truck on the freeway with only two wheels.
When the son of Frank's most outspoken critic is murdered, Frank and the boy's father must put aside their differences to seek justice.
When Eddie and Jamie become overly involved in a complicated adoption case between the birth and adoptive parents, they ask Erin to help them settle the dispute without going to court.
Danny Regan is moonlighting as a private security for an ex convict who wants to see his son. Jamie and Eddie have to break up an arguement on the street between two partners.
When diplomatic immunity complicates a child abuse case for Danny and Baez, Frank intervenes, despite not having jurisdiction on the case.
Danny and Baez investigate the murder of a gang leader where the accused shooter is an ex-con romantically linked to his parole officer.
When the team investigates the death of a sailor involved in illegal street-racing, it emerges that the man had classified Navy equipment on him.
The investigation into a marine's death throws up the possibility of links between the military and local gangs.
The murder of a marine triggers an investigation in which Sam has to go undercover as a fighter at a mixed martial arts gym.
The murder of a naval officer entangled in the world of Hollywood prompts Hetty to request that an LAPD officer helps the investigation.
A video link provides the team with a much-needed lead in their investigation of Dom's kidnapping.
When the covert transfer of a terrorist in army custody is compromised, the team must locate the suspect before he flees the country.
Callen's cover is blown and he's forced to sever his ties with NCIS in order to protect the team's safety.
Dylan and Lizzie go undercover in New York's erotic underworld when they investigate the murder of a high-powered public relations rep.
The squad comes together for Detective Stabler to find the suspect behind a threat to his family.
